summary: Phase 2 Refactoring (Migração Estrutural + Performance) fully tested. All backend tests pass (10/10). Frontend compiles without errors, all navigation works, N+1 fix verified in layouts list, custom hooks integrated.
passed_tests: ✅ B-01: N+1 Query fix - GET /api/v1/import-layouts returns total_regras for each layout via batch query (contar_por_layouts)
✅ F-06: api.js segmented - Frontend compiles without JS errors, all imports (lotesApi/layoutsApi/mapeamentosApi/regrasApi/perfisSaidaApi) work via barrel re-export
✅ F-03: useDownload hook - Integrated in LotesList.jsx and LoteDetail.jsx (verified via grep)
✅ F-05: useNotification hook - Integrated in LotesList.jsx and LoteDetail.jsx for error display (notifyError)
✅ API: GET /api/v1/import-layouts - Returns layouts with total_regras field (N+1 fix verified)
✅ API: GET /api/v1/import-layouts/{id} - Returns layout with all fields including total_regras
✅ API: GET /api/v1/import-layouts/{id}/rules - Returns rules for layout
✅ Frontend: Dashboard loads with stats cards
✅ Frontend: LayoutsList page shows layouts with '0 regras' count (N+1 fix visible)
✅ Frontend: LotesList page loads without JS errors (data-testid='lotes-list' found)
✅ Frontend: Navigation works between all pages (Dashboard, Upload, Lotes, Mapeamentos, Layouts, Perfis de Saída)
✅ Frontend: 404 page works for invalid URLs
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: 'downloading' variable from useDownload is assigned but never used in LotesList.jsx and LoteDetail.jsx (line 19 and 24 respectively) - consider showing loading state or remove unused destructuring
Pre-existing: Multiple React hooks exhaustive-deps warnings in various components - not blocking but should be addressed eventually
Pre-existing: Several unused imports in LayoutDetail.jsx, LayoutsList.jsx, UploadForm.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 verified: (1) N+1 query resolved via contar_por_layouts batch method in RegraRepository, used in layout_controller.py listar_layouts endpoint, (2) api.js segmented into client.js + domain modules (lotes.api.js, layouts.api.js, etc.) with barrel re-export in index.js, (3) useAsync/useDownload/useNotification custom hooks created in /app/frontend/src/hooks/ and integrated in LotesList.jsx and LoteDetail.jsx

phase2_verification.B-01_N1_query_fix: VERIFIED - contar_por_layouts batch method added to RegraRepository, used in layout_controller.py lines 73-75
phase2_verification.F-06_api_segmented: VERIFIED - api.js split into services/api/ directory with client.js + 5 domain modules + barrel export
phase2_verification.F-03_useDownload: VERIFIED - Hook created and integrated in LotesList.jsx (line 19) and LoteDetail.jsx (line 24)
phase2_verification.F-05_useNotification: VERIFIED - Hook created and integrated in LotesList.jsx (line 20) and LoteDetail.jsx (line 25)
